ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of card held by the customer (e.g., Credit, Debit) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer in USD */,
  "spending_score" INTEGER /* Spending score based on customer spending habits */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential or billing address */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score to assess creditworthiness */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., Email, Phone) */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has opted into marketing communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spending_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spending analysis entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer being analyzed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group category (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket category (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "average_spending" REAL /* Average spending calculated for the customer */,
  "spending_category" TEXT /* Category of spending (e.g., Groceries, Entertainment) */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions in the analysis period */,
  "total_spending" REAL /* Total amount spent in the analysis period */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign associated with the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spending_analysis_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
